sentences.english: My hometown has changed so much in the last ten years.
All the small shops are gone, and now it's all big chain stores.
sentences.korean: 작은 가게들이 다 없어지고 이제 다 대형 체인점이에요.

sentences.english: My town is exactly the same as when I left, which is kind of comforting.
sentences.korean: 내가 떠났을 때와 우리 동네는 똑같아요. 그게 나름 위안이 돼요.

sentences.english: They built a huge shopping mall where the old park used to be, and I was really upset about it.
sentences.korean: 옛날 공원 자리에 큰 쇼핑몰을 지었고 정말 속상했어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
